title: Warden Health Bar
description: A simple data pack that adds visible health bars and bossbars for wardens. Fully compatible with multiple wardens.
body:
This is a simple data pack that adds visible health bars and bossbars for wardens. Intended to make fights against wardens easier as player can see their remaining HP.

**_Please download the latest version for all the features and the best experience. Version 1.3.3 and 1.3.4 is identical except for their supported Minecraft versions._**

**_This data pack requires function macro to work._**

### Features:
- Compatible with multiple wardens.
- Display a text health bar showing the current health and max health of each warden above their hitbox, automatically modify the vertical position according to their attribute "minecraft:scale" and their digging / emerging animation.
- Customizing the vertical offset of the text health bar is possible.
- Optional bossbar function, which shows each warden's health bar in the form of bossbar to all players within 55 blocks of the warden.

### Commands:
```mcfunction
/function warden_health_bar:setting/toggle_bossbar
```
> to toggle bossbar function
```mcfunction
/function warden_health_bar:setting/set_text_height_offest {value:<decimal>}
```
> to set the vertical offset of the text health bar (default: 0.3), must input a valid double decimal / integer
```mcfunction
/function warden_health_bar:setting/reset_text_height_offest
```
> to reset the vertical offset of the text health bar to its default value 0.3
